mapper.insert: insert into feedbacks ( ticket_no, access_token, user_id, report_url, report_type, form_content, email, user_agent, ip, status, updated_at ) values ( #{ticketNo}, #{accessToken}, #{userId}, #{reportUrl}, #{reportType}, #{formContentJson}, #{email}, #{userAgent}, #{ip}, 'PENDING', current_timestamp )
mapper.select: select * from feedbacks where ticket_no = #{ticketNo} and deleted_at is null
select * from feedbacks where access_token = #{accessToken} and deleted_at is null
select * from feedbacks where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
mapper.update: update feedbacks set status = #{status}, updated_at = current_timestamp, resolved_at = case when #{status} = 'RESOLVED' then current_timestamp else resolved_at end, closed_at = case when #{status} = 'CLOSED' then current_timestamp else closed_at end where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null

update feedbacks set admin_reply = #{reply}, reply_time = case when #{reply} <> '' then current_timestamp else reply_time end, last_admin_reply_at = case when #{reply} <> '' then current_timestamp else last_admin_reply_at end, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update feedbacks set last_user_reply_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
mapper.select: select * from feedback_messages where feedback_id = #{feedbackId} order by created_at asc, id asc
mapper.update: update feedbacks set deleted_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}

update feedbacks set deleted_at = current_timestamp where deleted_at is null and status in ('RESOLVED', 'CLOSED') and coalesce(closed_at, resolved_at, updated_at, reply_time, feedback_time) < #{threshold}
mapper.select: select value_text from settings where key_name = 'basic.author_email'
